steps.title: Substitute for the variable
steps.content:
The question gives $v=6w$ and asks for $3v$. Replace $v$ with $6w$ in that expression:
$$3v=3(6w)$$

steps.title: Multiply the factors
steps.content:
Now multiply the coefficients:
$$3(6w)=18w$$
So $3v$ is equivalent to $18w$. The answer is A.
